Daily quest

Fulzar madness

Daily
Level90
Typekill
Target count80
Rewards2

Objective

Level90
Typekill
SystemFulzar
Planetn/a
Count80

Defeat 80 enemies of any kind in Fulzar.

Kill 80 (any) enemies in Fulzar.

Targets

  • System: Fulzar
  • Any matching target is valid.

Rewards

RewardAmount / roll
XP62-320
ARTIFACT1

Detected Solution Path

  1. Travel to Fulzar.
  2. Complete 80 kill(s) against any enemy.
  3. Claim the daily reward after the objective completes.
